# nahtnam

Manthan (@nahtnam) is a Principal Software Engineer at Mercury. This personal site includes a portfolio, work history, writing, travel stats, a Golf R build ledger, and small public tools.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.nahtnam.com/
- Experience: https://www.nahtnam.com/experience
- Blog: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog
- Contact: https://www.nahtnam.com/contact
- Travel: https://www.nahtnam.com/travel
- Golf R Build: https://www.nahtnam.com/golf-r
- Pomodoro Flip Clock: https://www.nahtnam.com/pomodoro
- Text Me: https://www.nahtnam.com/text-me

## Writing

- What Mattered While Building Mercury Command: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/what-mattered-while-building-mercury-command
- Announcing Next.js Route Jumper: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/announcing-nextjs-route-jumper
- Announcing TanStack Route Jumper: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/announcing-tanstack-route-jumper
- Claude Bought Me a Car: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/claude-bought-me-a-car
- How I Set Up a New Mac: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/how-i-set-up-a-new-mac
- YNAB for the Middle Class: https://www.nahtnam.com/blog/ynab-for-the-middle-class

## Entity facts

- Person: Manthan
- Handle: @nahtnam
- Role: Principal Software Engineer at Mercury
- Topics: software engineering, startups, developer tools, personal finance, travel, cars, productivity
- GitHub: https://github.com/nahtnam
- X: https://twitter.com/nahtnam

## Access notes

Public pages are intended to be crawlable and citable. Admin, sign-in, API, and password-gated private pages are not part of the public knowledge surface.
